name: @centraid/vault
description: Duaility personal ontology vault — the canonical, person-owned data model (core spine + consent plane + agent plane + 8 life domains) over local-first SQLite, and the gateway: the sole holder of connections, where every read and typed command passes one pipeline (identity → consent → contract → execution → evidence) and leaves receipts. Implements the logical model in duaility-ontology.html.
